title: ARTISIA 2024
description: Annual inter-college art competition celebrating World Art Day with events in painting, sketching, sculpture, and crafts.

title: CodeSprint 2024
description: Competitive programming contest with problem-solving challenges across multiple difficulty levels. Serves as selection round for internships.

title: Robocon 2024
description: National robotics competition where teams design and build robots to complete specific tasks and challenges.

title: Firodiya Karandak 2024
description: Premier inter-college drama competition at Pune. MITAOE drama club consistently ranks in top 20 with award-winning performances.

title: Smart India Hackathon
description: National hackathon organized by Government of India. MITAOE students previously won at IIT Dhanbad.

title: NAKSHTRA — Annual Fest
description: Annual gathering featuring performances and exhibitions from all student clubs. Includes Club Mela, cultural shows, and technical showcases.

title: Code Velocity Challenge
description: Speed coding competition organized by GirlScript chapter, testing algorithmic problem-solving under time pressure.

title: International Yoga Day
description: Annual celebration with mass yoga sessions, meditation workshops, and wellness awareness programs.

title: Aero Flying Demo
description: Live aeromodel flying demonstration showcasing student-built aircraft with aerodynamics explanation.

title: Blood Donation Drive
description: Community blood donation camp organized in collaboration with local blood banks.

title: Codebytes Workshop
description: Competitive programming workshop for 2nd year students covering data structures, algorithms, and competitive coding strategies.

title: Photography Walk
description: Guided photography walk exploring campus and nearby nature, learning composition and lighting techniques.
